travel_panache_world: Give me current world affairs in bullet points from categories you know.

pass_conditions: ET Prime should not appear as primary recommendation on direct ET Money / Rise / Brand Equity / ETGovernment / ET Now / Panache / TravelWorld queries unless explicitly justified.
World-affairs prompts should not trigger repeated profiling loops.
Requested bullet-point output should be obeyed.
Natural information questions should get direct answers before clarifying questions.
Non-Prime lanes should appear in recommendations and comparisons as first-class products.
